name: Idli Upma

ingredients.name: green chili
ingredients.notes: chopped or ½ to 1 teaspoon chopped

steps.instruction: Crumble 5 to 6 idlis and keep aside.
steps.tip: Use freshly made warm idli or leftover idli (bring refrigerated idli to room temperature).

steps.instruction: Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a pan. Add ½ teaspoon mustard seeds and let them crackle on low heat.
When they start crackling, add ½ teaspoon urad dal and ½ teaspoon cumin seeds.
Saute till the urad dal turns golden stirring often on low heat.
Then add 5 to 6 curry leaves, ½ teaspoon finely chopped ginger, 1 dry red chili (seeds removed) and 1 green chili (chopped). You can also add a pinch of asafoetida.
Stir and then add ¼ cup chopped onion. Saute till the onions turn translucent stirring often on low heat.
Then add the crumbled idli. Also add a bit of salt as per taste. Mix very well and saute for a minute or two.
Then switch off the heat. Lastly add 1 to 2 tablespoons of chopped coriander leaves.
steps.tip: You can also add some grated coconut.

steps.instruction: Mix again and serve idli upma hot.

tips: The recipe can be easily doubled or tripled.
If using refrigerated idlis, bring them to room temperature first.
You can vary the amount of spices as per your taste.
Idli podi can also be added.
To make it more nutritious, add some grated veggies, boiled peas, cashews or roasted peanuts.
variations: Add some grated veggies, boiled peas, cashews or roasted peanuts.
For Mumbai style, sprinkle some sev and drizzle some lemon juice.
